name: oss-solo-maintainer
description: Baseline posture for an OSS project with a solo maintainer: 1-approval PR checks, signed commits everywhere, secret scanning + push protection, dependabot alerts, squash-merge defaults.

required_checks.description: Comma-separated required CI check names added to the pr-checks ruleset (e.g. 'pre-commit,make gate').  Omit to skip the required_status_checks rule.
